title: Havells India Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Havells India Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Havells India Consulting Pvt Ltd is actively seeking a talented and motivated Quality Control Engineer to join our dynamic team in Dhanbad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Havells India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Havells India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Havells India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
